page.title: Marbella Jet Ski Rental with Boat Charter: Combo Packages

data.meta_description: Find the best marbella jet ski rental with boat charter combo packages. Ride a jet ski for free on Mangusta 80 charters from Puerto Banús. Book now.
data.summary: Combine a luxury boat charter with a free jet ski rental on select vessels like the Mangusta 80. This guide covers combo packages, pricing, and tips for enjoying both from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Mangusta 80 charters include a free jet ski rental (minimum 4h, €4,719).
All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Combo packages include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and IVA.
Jet ski sessions typically last 30–60 minutes, supervised by the skipper.
Other boats (e.g., Azimut 58, Ferretti 94) can add jet ski on request.
Best months for jet skiing: May–October (water temp 18–26°C).
Puerto Banús to Cabopino or Cala del Faro are popular jet ski routes.

faq.q: Which boat charters include a free jet ski in Marbella?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) and its white/grey variants include a free jet ski on any charter of 4 hours or more (€4,719 minimum). Other boats like the Azimut 58 or Ferretti 94 can arrange a jet ski at an additional cost — contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

faq.q: How long can I use the jet ski during a boat charter?
faq.a: Typically, the jet ski is available for 30–60 minutes during the charter, supervised by the skipper. You can split the time between riders. The exact duration depends on the charter length and weather conditions.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to ride a jet ski in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, Spanish law requires a specific jet ski licence (PER or PNB with jet ski endorsement) or a temporary permit. Our skipper will brief you and may offer a short training session. If no one in your group has a licence, the skipper can drive while you ride as a passenger.

faq.q: What is the best area for jet skiing near Marbella?
faq.a: The coastline from Puerto Banús to Cabopino offers calm waters and stunning views of La Concha mountain. Further east, Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés provide quieter coves. The skipper will recommend the best route based on sea conditions.

faq.q: Can I add a jet ski to any boat charter?
faq.a: Yes, we can arrange a jet ski for most boats in our fleet (e.g., Azimut 58, Ferretti 94, Canados 86) on request. Pricing depends on the boat size and charter duration — contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote.

faq.q: What is included in the Mangusta 80 combo package?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 combo (from €4,719 for 4 hours) includes: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, Spanish IVA, and a free jet ski. The jet ski is towed or stored on board.

faq.q: How many people can ride the jet ski?
faq.a: The jet ski is designed for 1–2 riders at a time. All passengers on the charter can take turns. The Mangusta 80 accommodates up to 12 guests, so everyone gets a chance to ride.

faq.q: What should I bring for a jet ski and boat combo day?
faq.a: Bring swimwear, sunscreen (SPF 50+), a towel, sunglasses with a strap, and a change of clothes. A waterproof phone pouch is useful. We provide life jackets and all safety gear.

data.body_html:
Combining a luxury boat charter with a jet ski session is the ultimate way to experience the Costa del Sol. Our marbella jet ski rental with boat charter combo packages let you cruise the Mediterranean in style, then hop on a jet ski for a thrill ride along the coast. The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski on all charters from 4 hours — no extra fees, just pure fun. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, corporate event, or simply enjoying a day out, this combo delivers maximum value from Puerto Banús.

Why Choose a Jet Ski & Boat Charter Combo in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline offers 27 km of golden beaches, secluded coves, and clear waters — perfect for both cruising and jet skiing. A combo package means you don't have to choose between relaxation and adrenaline. You can sunbathe on the flybridge, sip cava, then zip across the waves on a jet ski. The skipper handles navigation, so you focus on having fun. Plus, with the Mangusta 80's free jet ski offer, you save €200–€400 compared to renting separately.

Our Combo Packages: Which Boat Includes a Jet Ski?

Currently, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) and its white/grey variants are the only boats in our fleet that include a free jet ski with every charter of 4 hours or more. The price is €4,719 for 4 hours, and you can extend up to 8 hours on request. Other vessels like the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) or the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) can add a jet ski for an additional fee — contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote.

BoatLengthPaxJet Ski Included?Price (4h)
Mangusta 8024m12Yes (free)€4,719
Mangusta 80 (White)24m12Yes (free)€4,719
Mangusta 80 (Grey)24m12Yes (free)€4,719
Other boatsVariesUp to 12On request (+ fee)On request

How the Jet Ski Session Works

Your jet ski is either towed behind the boat or stored on the deck/platform. Once you reach a calm spot — often near Cabopino or Cala del Faro — the skipper will brief you on safety and operation. You'll get 30–60 minutes of riding time, split between guests. Life jackets are mandatory and provided. The skipper stays nearby for assistance. If you have a valid Spanish jet ski licence (PER or PNB), you can ride solo; otherwise, the skipper can drive while you ride as a passenger.

Best Routes for Jet Skiing from Puerto Banús

From Puerto Banús, head east towards Marbella Marina and the Golden Mile, where the water is usually flat in the morning. Alternatively, go west to Estepona or Sotogrande for longer runs. Popular jet ski spots include:

  • Cala del Faro — a quiet cove with clear water, 15 minutes by boat from Banús.
  • Cala Cortés — another hidden gem, ideal for a quick dip after jet skiing.
  • Cabopino — a sandy beach with a nature reserve backdrop, 20 minutes east.

The skipper will choose the best route based on wind and swell. For a full day, consider an 8-hour charter that combines jet skiing, swimming, and lunch at a chiringuito.

What's Included in Every Charter

All our boat charters — including combo packages — come with these inclusions:

  • Licensed skipper (English & Spanish speaking)
  • Fuel for the entire charter
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks (chips, nuts, olives)
  • Insurance and safety equipment (life jackets, fire extinguisher, first aid)
  • Spanish IVA (21% VAT)

For the Mangusta 80 combo, the jet ski is also included. No hidden costs.

Pricing Overview

Our combo packages start at €4,719 for 4 hours on the Mangusta 80. For shorter charters (2–3 hours), the jet ski is not included, but you can add it for a fee. Here's a quick breakdown:

  • Mangusta 80 (4h): €4,719 — free jet ski
  • Mangusta 80 (6h): €6,579 — free jet ski
  • Mangusta 80 (8h): €8,439 — free jet ski
  • Other boats (any duration): pricing on request via WhatsApp

For smaller groups, consider the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax, from €749/2h) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax, from €749/2h) — jet ski can be added on request.

When to Go: Best Season for Jet Skiing

The Mediterranean water temperature in Marbella ranges from 18°C in May to 26°C in August. The best months for jet skiing are June to September, when the sea is calm and the sun is strong. May and October are also good, with fewer crowds. Avoid winter (November–March) as the water is cold and winds can be strong. Our charters run year-round, but jet ski availability is weather-dependent.

Safety & Licensing Requirements

Spanish law requires a jet ski licence (PER or PNB with jet ski endorsement) to ride independently. If no one in your group has a licence, the skipper can operate the jet ski while you ride as a passenger — this is allowed and common. We provide life jackets and a safety briefing before departure. The jet ski is limited to 2 persons at a time. Children under 16 can ride as passengers with an adult.

How to Book Your Combo Package

Ready to combine a luxury boat charter with a jet ski adventure? Browse our full fleet and select the Mangusta 80 for a free jet ski, or contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote on other boats. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially in summer. All charters depart from Puerto Banús — we'll send you the exact berth details upon confirmation.

Frequently asked questions

Which boat charters include a free jet ski in Marbella?

The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) and its white/grey variants include a free jet ski on any charter of 4 hours or more (€4,719 minimum). Other boats like the Azimut 58 or Ferretti 94 can arrange a jet ski at an additional cost — contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

How long can I use the jet ski during a boat charter?

Typically, the jet ski is available for 30–60 minutes during the charter, supervised by the skipper. You can split the time between riders. The exact duration depends on the charter length and weather conditions.

Do I need a licence to ride a jet ski in Marbella?

Yes, Spanish law requires a specific jet ski licence (PER or PNB with jet ski endorsement) or a temporary permit. Our skipper will brief you and may offer a short training session. If no one in your group has a licence, the skipper can drive while you ride as a passenger.

What is the best area for jet skiing near Marbella?

The coastline from Puerto Banús to Cabopino offers calm waters and stunning views of La Concha mountain. Further east, Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés provide quieter coves. The skipper will recommend the best route based on sea conditions.

Can I add a jet ski to any boat charter?

Yes, we can arrange a jet ski for most boats in our fleet (e.g., Azimut 58, Ferretti 94, Canados 86) on request. Pricing depends on the boat size and charter duration — contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote.

What is included in the Mangusta 80 combo package?

The Mangusta 80 combo (from €4,719 for 4 hours) includes: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, Spanish IVA, and a free jet ski. The jet ski is towed or stored on board.

How many people can ride the jet ski?

The jet ski is designed for 1–2 riders at a time. All passengers on the charter can take turns. The Mangusta 80 accommodates up to 12 guests, so everyone gets a chance to ride.

What should I bring for a jet ski and boat combo day?

Bring swimwear, sunscreen (SPF 50+), a towel, sunglasses with a strap, and a change of clothes. A waterproof phone pouch is useful. We provide life jackets and all safety gear.
